json_data.title: Computer Networks Fundamentals
json_data.reason: Extends the Network Manager component by teaching how computers communicate and share data across local and wide area networks.

json_data.title: Process Scheduling Algorithms
json_data.reason: Deepens understanding of the Processor Manager by exploring how operating systems allocate CPU time using algorithms like FCFS, SJF, and Round Robin.

json_data.title: Distributed Operating Systems
json_data.reason: Advances knowledge by examining how OS manages multiple interconnected computers that appear as a single system to users, building on multiprocessing and cloud computing concepts.
